Localization.Description: The user renamed the AD object or requested a TGT ticket on behalf of an account that matches the name of the domain controller. This may indicate a sAMAccountName spoofing attack. It can allow an attacker to obtain a TGT ticket, for example, in the name of a domain controller, gain a foothold in the system and increase their privileges

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} requested a TGT using an account that matches the domain controller name on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} renamed an AD object to "{object.account.name}" on host {event_src.host}
